CONTENT.Club career: Dierckx joined Parma in January 2021 from Genk. He made his Serie A debut on 17 January 2021 against Sassuolo.On 12 August 2022, Dierckx was loaned back by Genk and assigned to the reserve squad Jong Genk in the second-tier Challenger Pro League.On 3 September 2023, Dierckx signed a three-year contract with Standard Liège. He was assigned to the reserve squad SL16 FC.
CONTENT.External links: Daan Dierckx at the Royal Belgian Football Association

SUMMARY: Daan Dierckx (born 24 February 2003) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a centre back for Standard Liège and their reserve squad SL16 FC.
